name: invarians
summary: Python SDK for the Invarians panel API: three primitives in one signed payload (Attestation, Regime + Bridge State, Delta) with per-chain calibrated precursors, BRIDGE_STATE_STRUCTURAL_v1.2 sidecar including event-based I5 stuck-detection on Standard mode, and per-message CCTP V2 (Circle ECDSA, keyed by attributed nonce) and CCIP (source-dest matched by messageId) retrieval
